src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Refactor multi-line string concatenation in log statements to use Java 15+ text blocks for improved readability.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Import and use CRLFLogConverter to ensure log messages are safe from CRLF injection attacks, a security best practice.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: env.getActiveProfiles().length == 0 ? env.getDefaultProfiles() : env.getActiveProfiles()

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: return DataSourceBuilder.create().url(liquibaseProperties.getUrl()).username(user).password(password).build();
